shellCommands.command:
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '
--- files ---
' && rg --files | head -80 && printf '
--- status ---
' && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,260p' src/plugins/zoom/index.ts; printf '
--- props ---
'; sed -n '1,240p' src/plugins/zoom/props.ts; printf '
--- zoom props hook ---
'; sed -n '1,260p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomProps.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,320p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts; printf '
--- image rect ---
'; sed -n '1,280p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts; printf '
--- sensors ---
'; sed -n '1,320p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomSensors.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,360p' test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts; printf '
--- custom slide docs/types ---
'; rg -n \"render.slide|slide.*type|Slide |isImage |supports|maxZoom\" src test docs/plugins/zoom.md docs/examples/custom-slides.md"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "yet-another-react-lightbox Zoom plugin custom slide supports maxZoom" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' test/unit/test-utils.tsx; sed -n '1,120p' src/plugins/zoom/ZoomButton.tsx; sed -n '1,100p' src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomCallback.ts; rg -n \"getByClass|CLASS_SLIDE_WRAPPER|ZoomWrapper|zoom.maxZoom|Zoom in\" test/unit src | head -100"
/bin/bash -lc "git diff -- src/plugins/zoom && sed -n '1,120p' tsconfig.json && sed -n '1,100p' src/index.ts"
/bin/bash -lc 'npx eslint src/plugins/zoom test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts && npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --ignoreDeprecations 6.0'

/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff -- src/plugins/zoom/Zoom.tsx src/plugins/zoom/ZoomController.tsx src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomImageRect.ts src/plugins/zoom/hooks/useZoomState.ts src/plugins/zoom/index.ts test/unit/plugins/Zoom.spec.ts'

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/yarl-zoom-custom-slide-support.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Zoom custom slide support

Opted-in non-image slides can reuse the Zoom wrapper by treating the slide viewport as their content bounds. Their maximum zoom comes from the Zoom option, defaulting to 8x, while image slides continue using natural-resolution geometry; zoom availability follows the active wrapper rather than an image source.
EOF
mempal ingest \""'$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals

printf '"'
--- final status ---
'
git status --short
printf '
--- diff check ---
'
git diff --check"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
